## Checklist

- [ ] Logo artwork comes from an official source.
- [ ] PNG and WebP derivatives were generated from the accepted source.
- [ ] Metadata is complete.
- [ ] Trademark policy is respected.
- [ ] `pnpm validate` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm logos:check-formats` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm institutions:check` passes.
